title: Evelyn Diaries becomes our recap home
summary: A public, polished place for our shared work: highlights up top, day-by-day log underneath, and daily updates when there is something worth adding.

title: Earth-Scale Cost per Transaction ships
summary: A metric idea became a live GitHub Pages site, then a deeper research thread into real client-side data sources for chain costs and throughput.

title: Hermes Agent Creative Hackathon radar
summary: Tracked the hackathon launch and kept the relevant Nous/Hermes momentum visible alongside Midnight ecosystem updates.

title: Cariddi-Cowork ready for real collaboration
summary: Set up the repo locally with origin/upstream remotes so future changes can flow cleanly through pushes and PRs.

title: Shared research skill created
summary: Built the internet-research-toolbox skill and placed it into the shared skills workflow for Hermes/Carly/Sancho-style reuse.

title: Snake bot hackathon sprint
summary: The frantic Rust/WebSocket bot sprint: live server, tests, toroidal movement, reconnects, and LuloxBot entering the arena.

title: Gateway reliability deep dive
summary: A lower-level Hermes/OpenClaw investigation that mapped how messaging, Telegram recovery, and platform reconnects fit together.
